runners.spotlight: Bit disappointing from a favourable box here a month ago but a wide draw scuppered him the run before and prior to that he had been running well in Class 4s; if back on his game he'd probably have a chance.
runners.comment: Last two runs below par but had been running well in Class 4s; couldn't dismiss

runners.name: Cirrus Speed
runners.spotlight: It was a Class 4 in which he was a closing sixth here two runs ago but, as last time out in a Class 5, he's dropped unlucky with the draw.
runners.comment: As last time out in a Class 5, he's dropped unlucky with the draw

runners.name: Crazy Treasure
runners.spotlight: Maiden; runner-up on dirt here in September 2024 on last official start; not overly convincing in his recent trials.
runners.comment: 2nd on dirt in Sept 2024 on last official start; unconvincing in his recent trials
runners.owner: Lun Kwok Wai, Alan Lun Yue Hang & Ng Kam Kwan

races.race_name: Swan Handicap (Class 4) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Alabama Song
runners.spotlight: Reserve; poorly drawn since his C&D win in April but he is 5lb higher this time even if back on song.
runners.comment: Reserve; poorly drawn since his C&D win in April but he is 5lb higher this time

runners.name: Let's Have Fun
runners.spotlight: Recent thirds were not that threatening, though he wasn't far behind Francis Meynell over C&D last time despite being drawn wider; considered.
runners.comment: Wasn't far behind Francis Meynell over C&D last time despite being drawn wider; considered

runners.name: Flash Current
runners.spotlight: Struggled of late but he went very close off 4lb higher in a Class 3 over C&D in January and could be interesting in this less taxing company.
runners.comment: Struggled of late but he went very close off 4lb higher in a Class 3 over C&D in January

runners.name: Prestige Hall
runners.spotlight: No wins in 11 but runner-up on four occasions and latest fourth was a close one; looks ready for another crack at 7f but stall 12 tempers enthusiasm.
runners.comment: In form and looks ready for another crack at 7f but stall 12 tempers enthusiasm

runners.name: King Of Fighters
runners.spotlight: Has the form to feature at this level but doesn't return here in top form and he's drawn very wide.
runners.comment: Has the form to feature at this level but doesn't return here in top form; drawn wide

runners.name: Francis Meynell
runners.spotlight: A near miss over C&D in March isn't his only competitive effort this year, also 20 days ago running well in defeat; Purton takes over off an untouched mark.
runners.comment: Solid second over C&D 20 days ago and Purton takes over off an untouched mark
runners.owner: Albert Hung Chao Hong & Kevin Hung Dingteng

runners.name: Derrynblue
runners.spotlight: Opposable on his form here and on one visit to Happy Valley; recent trial efforts nothing to shout about.
runners.comment: Opposable on his form here and on one visit to Happy Valley
runners.owner: Kenneth Kong Siu Chee & Elaine Kong Yick Ning

runners.name: Call Me Sparkle
runners.spotlight: Won on debut in spite of traffic issues and wasn't far away off a 1lb lower mark than today's next time; drawn out of contention since but no excuses on that score today; gives the impression that he'll stay this longer trip.
runners.comment: Career started well and poorly drawn in his last two races; drawn in 1 today

runners.name: Chiu Chow Golf
runners.spotlight: Had a few chances in trials this year, twice finishing runner-up; didn't show enough on debut here over 6f to believe he'll be the answer to this race.
runners.comment: Didn't show enough on debut here over 6f to believe he'll be the answer to this race

runners.name: Massive Reward
runners.spotlight: Down the field in both official races here over 6f; third in a recent trial but Zac Purton who rode that day has turned elsewhere.
runners.comment: Third in a recent trial but Zac Purton who rode that day has turned elsewhere

runners.name: Mighty Fighter
runners.spotlight: Plenty of promise in trials and beaten under 4l in 6f handicaps at Happy Valley and here; could improve for 7f; respected.
runners.comment: Plenty of promise in trials and beaten under 4l in 6f handicaps at Happy Valley and here

runners.name: Grand Patch
runners.spotlight: Reserve; competitive in trials but twice comfortably beaten here over 6f, when slowly away and then drawn wide; probably has a bigger run in him.
runners.comment: Reserve; competitive in trials and some excuses for his two defeats here at 6f

runners.name: Lady's Love
runners.spotlight: Lightly raced 3yo but hasn't offered all that much at a higher level and stall 13 is a further negative.
runners.comment: Lightly raced 3yo but hasn't offered all that much at a higher level
runners.owner: HK Association Of Lady Horse Lovers Syndicate

runners.name: Spicy Bonus
runners.spotlight: His debut here over 5f wasn't devoid of promise but since beaten in a good few trials; big step up in distance.
runners.comment: His debut here over 5f wasn't devoid of promise but since beaten in a good few trials

runners.name: Eternal Richness
runners.spotlight: Won when based in Australia but well held so far in Hong Kong and recent trial efforts were not too persuasive.
runners.comment: Well held so far in Hong Kong and recent trial efforts were not too persuasive
runners.owner: Ng Ying Kit & Kenny Ng Chun Pang

runners.name: Sky Deep
runners.spotlight: Driven out for a breakthrough win over 7f here in March 2025 and last week's run was at 6f over which he got outpaced; could have a part to play, though could be better drawn.
runners.comment: C&D winner in March 2025 and last week's run was at 6f over which he was outpaced
runners.owner: Kwan Kin Man, Dora Kwan Man Ting & Bryan Kwan Hon Ming

races.race_name: Flamingo Handicap (Class 4) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Prestige Ricky
runners.spotlight: Twice a winner in Britain for Roger Varian; had plenty of chances in Hong Kong and, while he's capable of winning off his current mark, he's none too consistent; unraced over quite this far.
runners.comment: Competitive form in HK but none too consistent and unraced over quite this far

runners.name: Sharpen Bright
runners.spotlight: Third in a recent trial but well beaten 59 days ago in his last official race, over this trip at Happy Valley; now back with previous trainer.
runners.comment: Well beaten 59 days ago in his last official race, over this trip at Happy Valley

runners.name: Enthralled
runners.spotlight: Three-time winner who lurks on a good mark and returned to form with a rallying second here 13 days ago; in the mix.
runners.comment: On a good mark and returned to form with a rallying second here 13 days ago

runners.name: Absolute Honour
runners.spotlight: Seems to need this sort of trip nowadays as he won over 1m under Purton here in April and having travelled well was close up behind Romantic Fantasy over this far a month ago; 5lb better off with the winner.
runners.comment: Close up behind Romantic Fantasy latest and he's 5lb better off with the winner

runners.name: On The Lash
runners.spotlight: Had the run of things under a canny ride from Nichola Yuen here a month ago and a 6lb higher mark could be troublesome; fourth in a trial since.
runners.comment: Had the run of things when winning here last time; 6lb higher mark could be troublesome

runners.name: Amazing Gaze
runners.spotlight: Consistent maiden who was strong in the betting when a close sixth over C&D in early May; that was on soft ground but he's fine on quicker and has since finished second in a trial; however, stall 13 could pose problems.
runners.comment: Consistent maiden who has been running okay but stall 13 could pose problems

runners.name: Smart Fat Cat
runners.spotlight: Competitive on occasions, as when runner-up over 1m here in April; fourth in a recent trial and off this low a mark there's a big run in him.
runners.comment: Fourth in a recent trial and off this low a mark there's a big run in him
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Admund Au Chi Hoe

runners.name: Charity Together
runners.spotlight: 1m2f winner here in March and soft ground perhaps not ideal next time; however, latest run needs forgiving and he looks a shade too high in the weights.
runners.comment: Latest run needs forgiving and he looks a shade too high in the weights

runners.name: Family Knight
runners.spotlight: Reserve; won on the AW in Britain but only the occasional promise for current connections; not the percentage call.
runners.comment: Reserve; won on the AW in Britain but only the occasional promise for current connections
runners.owner: Stephanie Fung Wing Man, Kelly Fung Et Al

runners.name: Automated
runners.spotlight: Successful in Australia but essentially disappointing in Hong Kong and remains best watched until showing some spark.
runners.comment: Essentially disappointing in Hong Kong and remains best watched until showing some spark

runners.name: Romantic Fantasy
runners.spotlight: Had Absolute Honour in third when winning over C&D but he was in rear throughout 13 days ago; that run was too bad to be true but does need forviging; 5lb higher than for that recent narrow win.
runners.comment: C&D winner in May but he was in rear throughout 13 days ago

runners.name: Fluorescence
runners.spotlight: Ex-Australian; little to show for his six runs in Hong Kong and can't be backed at present.
runners.comment: Ex-Australian; little to show for his six runs in Hong Kong and can't be backed at present

runners.name: Flying Knight
runners.spotlight: Reserve; won over 7f here in May before close third off a 6lb higher mark (1m); didn't entirely convince stamina-wise that day and now goes further.
runners.comment: Reserve; recent win was over 7f and 1m looked a stretch when third last time
runners.owner: Shi Ke Min & Frankie Fang Yuan

runners.name: Serangoon
runners.spotlight: Won quite stylishly over C&D in February but has not been at the same level since and is still 6lb above that mark.
runners.comment: Won quite stylishly over C&D in February but has not been at the same level since

runners.name: Bright Inheritance
runners.spotlight: Infrequent winner and well beaten on turf (blinkered) and dirt (eyeshield) in just two official sightings this year.
runners.comment: Infrequent winner and well beaten on turf and dirt in two official sightings this year
runners.owner: 23/24 Dennis C H Yip Trainer Syndicate

runners.name: Forever Folks
runners.spotlight: Has struggled since going up 8lb for winning on dirt here in January; effective on turf but this mark looks challenging.
runners.comment: Has struggled since going up 8lb for winning on dirt here in January

races.race_name: Sand Martin Handicap (Class 4) (All Weather)

runners.name: Fashion Legend
runners.spotlight: Inconsistent this season but well handicapped and did win a recent trial on the AW; not dismissed.
runners.comment: Inconsistent this season but well handicapped and did win a recent trial
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Boniface Ho Ka Kui

runners.name: Day Day Victory
runners.spotlight: Effective over 5f and 6f, here and at Happy Valley; fair mark and wasn't running badly until last time; possibilities should new partner Nichola Yuen get a tune out of him.
runners.comment: Possibilities should new partner Nichola Yuen get a tune out of him
runners.owner: Alan Kiang Ping Fai & Joyce Lee

runners.name: Cap Liner
runners.spotlight: Won a trial before finishing sixth of 14 over 5f here a month ago but only fifth in another trial since; seems a bit up and down and this is his first official race on dirt.
runners.comment: Seems a bit up and down and this is his first official race on dirt

runners.name: California Bay
runners.spotlight: Belatedly off the mark with a narrow defeat of One Man Show here in May but Happy Valley next time was underwhelming, even when factoring in the 6lb rise.
runners.comment: No good thing to confirm May placings with One Man Show and disappointed since

runners.name: One Man Show
runners.spotlight: Has won a barrier trial since pushing California Bay close over C&D in early May when Britney Wong was also aboard; weighted to reverse those placings.
runners.comment: Has won a barrier trial since pushing California Bay close over C&D in early May
runners.owner: 24/25 Frankie Lor Fu Chuen Trainer Syndicate

runners.name: Topspin King
runners.spotlight: Had to improve for the switch to dirt last time but failed to, finishing well behind in Juicy Dragon's race.
runners.comment: Had to improve for the switch to dirt last time but failed to, finishing well behind
runners.owner: John Hui Kin Yip & William Hui Chun Lim

runners.name: Super Rubick Kid
runners.spotlight: Some promise over 6f on turf and was drawn wide over 7f here 20 days ago; still hard to make a solid case on his dirt debut.
runners.comment: Some promise over 6f on turf and was drawn wide over 7f here 20 days ago; dirt debut

runners.name: Mega Captain
runners.spotlight: Has done well in trials; well held in his two turf races but his only run on dirt saw him chase home impressive winner Juicy Dragon here in early May; a 9lb pull in the weights could make it interesting.
runners.comment: Only dirt run was his second to Juicy Dragon; a 9lb pull could make it interesting
runners.owner: Leung Tin Fu, Leung Kit Faat & Ma Hing Man

runners.name: Armour War Eagle
runners.spotlight: Reserve; modest strikre-rate but stacks of placed efforts, the latest over C&D since when he's done well in trials; definite chance if getting in.
runners.comment: Reserve; modest strikre-rate but stacks of placed efforts, the latest over C&D

runners.name: Juicy Dragon
runners.spotlight: Only confirmed that he's happier on dirt than turf when again successful over C&D in early May, since when he's won a trial on the AW; 9lb higher than last time but that was very comfortable in beating Mega Captain.
runners.comment: 9lb higher than for his win here in early May but that was very comfortable

runners.name: Happy Shooter
runners.spotlight: Won on turf here in February and was close up over C&D last month; below par at Happy Valley next time but has won a dirt trial since; likely to go well.
runners.comment: Capable on turf and dirt; fair mark and confidence buoyed by a recent trial win
runners.owner: 23/24 Danny Shum Chap Shing Trainer Syndicate

runners.name: Lucky Doctor
runners.spotlight: Won on soft ground in Australia; no impact in Hong Kong and probably worth taking on despite finishing second in a recent trial.
runners.comment: No impact in Hong Kong and worth taking on despite finishing second in a recent trial
runners.owner: Dr Bosco Chan, Dr Chu Wai Ming Et Al

runners.name: My Triumph
runners.spotlight: Reserve; not had many chances but has to step up by quite a bit; beaten in two trials since last official race.
runners.comment: Reserve; not had many chances but has to step up by quite a bit
runners.owner: Ryan Wong Man Yeung & Roland Wong Ka Yeung

runners.name: Pejibaye
runners.spotlight: Consistent and progressive over this trip on turf late last year and has continued the good work in his recent trials, posting figures of 212; unexposed 4yo but making his dirt debut from a wide draw.
runners.comment: Has done well on turf, on the track and in trials; making dirt debut and from a wide draw

races.race_name: Swan Handicap (Class 4) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Voyage Boss
runners.spotlight: Not firing on all cylinders this year but was fourth on consecutive outings in March/April (6f/7f) and didn't run badly when midfield here last month, having raced on outside of the field from wide stall; much better drawn today and too well handicapped to ignore.
runners.comment: Had excuse when midfield last time; too well handicapped to ignore
runners.owner: Tommy Ching Tsun Wah, Fujisawa Tasayoshi Et Al

runners.name: Romantic Laos
runners.spotlight: Regressive 7yo who has not won since December 2024; kept on for fifth at Happy Valley (1m) last month but this drop back in trip is not ideal; others preferred.
runners.comment: Regressive 7yo who has not won since December 2024; others preferred

runners.name: Peridot
runners.spotlight: Placed over C&D in March and also ran well when fifth here later that month but he's 0-10 now and his wide draw makes things awkward; has never previously worn headgear but three aids are added today.
runners.comment: Ten-race maiden; twice ran well over C&D in March but has wide draw today

runners.name: Quartz Legend
runners.spotlight: Reserve; placed over 5f on debut in November but yet to build on that performance after ten subsequent sprint runs and finished down the field on latest outing three weeks ago; upped in trip today.
runners.comment: Placed over 5f on debut but yet to build on that performance after ten subsequent sprints

runners.name: Smiling Falcon
runners.spotlight: Nine-race maiden; placed here twice this season (7f/1m) but was below form when last seen seven weeks ago and, on balance, others are more persuasive.
runners.comment: Placed here twice this season (7f/1m) but, on balance, others are more persuasive

runners.name: Amo Ergo Sum
runners.spotlight: Yet to show anything more than minor promise after four runs (5f-6f); tries a new trip.
runners.comment: Yet to show anything more than minor promise after four runs (5f-6f); tries a new trip

runners.name: Gorgeous Victory
runners.spotlight: Still a maiden after seven starts but knocking on the door in recent weeks; kept on for third over C&D a fortnight ago and Zac Purton (who probably had other good options in this race) takes over this time; likely contender.
runners.comment: 0-7 but has been knocking on the door in recent weeks and Purton takes the ride today

runners.name: Synergy Express
runners.spotlight: Unplaced all five starts (5f-6f); worth a crack at this longer trip and certainly not devoid of ability but may need a drop in grade.
runners.comment: Unplaced all five starts (5f-6f); not devoid of ability but may need a drop in grade

runners.name: Prestige Superior
runners.spotlight: 2-6 when based in Australia but a down-the-field outsider on all eight Hong Kong starts; very difficult to enthuse over.
runners.comment: 2-6 when based in Australia but a down-the-field outsider on all eight Hong Kong starts

runners.name: Ghorgan
runners.spotlight: Placed twice over C&D in early part of this year; not quite in same form lately but sure to appreciate this ease in grade; can't be ruled out.
runners.comment: Not at best lately but sure to appreciate this ease in grade; can't be ruled out

runners.name: Akermanis Gold
runners.spotlight: Just a respectable sixth over C&D three weeks ago and has now been unplaced all seven Hong Kong starts; latest 2lb drop not enough to tempt.
runners.comment: Unplaced all seven Hong Kong starts; latest 2lb drop not enough to tempt

runners.name: Cornerstone
runners.spotlight: Yet to make much impact after six Hong Kong starts (all over 6f) and has awkward draw for first attempt at 7f.
runners.comment: Yet to make much impact after six Hong Kong starts (all over 6f)
runners.owner: 24/25 Dennis C H Yip Trainer Syndicate

runners.name: Lovely Miles
runners.spotlight: Reserve; launched career with two fairly encouraging runs last month (6f/7f) but might be one for a bit further down the line.
runners.comment: Launched career with two fairly encouraging runs last month but needs to improve
runners.owner: Keith Poon Pak Kit, Henry Cheng Wai Hong Et Al

runners.name: Polar Patch
runners.spotlight: Belied triple-digit odds when third over 6f here last month, his third run, and backed up that performance with C&D third on Sunday; Zac Purton evidently prefers Gorgeous Victory today but this fellow is still considered.
runners.comment: Showed much-improved form when placed on last two starts (6f/7f) and remains lightly raced

runners.name: Meaningful Dragon
runners.spotlight: Low-mileage 5yo who battled well for narrow C&D win last month, after a break; much better drawn today but has very mixed record and it's hard to predict whether he'll be in the right mood again.
runners.comment: Battled well for narrow C&D win last month but has very mixed record
runners.owner: Peter Chu Ka Lok, Maria Teresa Chu & Dr C Chu Ping Wing

runners.name: Sunday's Serenade
runners.spotlight: Runner-up twice over 1m at Happy Valley towards end of last year and beaten under 1l when third over C&D in January; deserted by Zac Purton today but has possibilities if tuned up after break.
runners.comment: Close third over C&D on latest outing; returns from 163-day break

races.race_name: Anser Handicap (Class 4) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Justifying
runners.spotlight: Reserve; inconsistent since winning over 5f here on debut in March 2025 and finished well down the field on last two appearances (1m/6f).
runners.comment: Well down the field on last two appearances (1m/6f); others readily preferred
runners.owner: Lau Sak Hong, Jimmy Wong Kwok Kin & Dr D L T Chak

runners.name: Fortune Supernova
runners.spotlight: 0-11 in Hong Kong, having signed off for Jimmy Ting with two down-the-field 6f runs in February/March; needs to have been perked up by subsequent change of scenery.
runners.comment: 0-11 in Hong Kong, having signed off for Jimmy Ting with two down-the-field runs; new yard

runners.name: Incredible Moment
runners.spotlight: Won readily from the front over C&D last month, his 14th start, but was hit with a 9lb rise for that and managed only fifth off new mark a fortnight later; needs to kick on again and is not drawn well.
runners.comment: C&D winner last month but held off new mark since; needs to kick on again

runners.name: Lucrative Eight
runners.spotlight: Placed over C&D on all three starts, most recently when second to Superb Spirit last month; ought to be in the shake-up again.
runners.comment: Placed over C&D on all three starts, most recently when second to Superb Spirit last month

runners.name: Lightning Ace
runners.spotlight: Unplaced all five starts; has shown some ability but is drawn wide today and probably needs a drop in grade.
runners.comment: Has shown some ability but is drawn wide today and probably needs a drop in grade

runners.name: Mabubu
runners.spotlight: Scored over C&D on debut in November and rebounded from two lesser efforts when fourth over 5f here last month but is drawn wide today and others have more persuasive profiles.
runners.comment: Back on track when fourth over 5f here last month but has wide draw today

runners.name: Real Gentleman
runners.spotlight: Began Hong Kong career with six down-the-field runs but displayed sudden jolt of improvement to cause 157-1 shock from stall 12 over C&D last month; interesting to see whether he can build on that performance.
runners.comment: Displayed sudden jolt of improvement to cause 157-1 shock from stall 12 over C&D in May
runners.owner: Wong Chung Yin, Wong Lai Ngor & Tracy Wong Chui

runners.name: Superb Spirit
runners.spotlight: Built upon promising debut when winning cosily over C&D for Zac Purton last month; well drawn again today and could still have a lot more to offer; commands respect.
runners.comment: Built upon promising debut when winning cosily over C&D for Zac Purton last month

runners.name: Island Buddy
runners.spotlight: Started off for Brett Crawford with two C&D wins and has made the frame on three of his four starts since, most recently when third from stall 12 here last month; has the inside draw this time and could be hard to catch.
runners.comment: Progressive for new stable this year (two C&D wins) and has plum inside draw

runners.name: Lean Flyer
runners.spotlight: Out of a four-time winner (1m2f-1m4f); won a 6f dirt trial last month and is well drawn for official debut; could have a say.
runners.comment: Won a 6f dirt trial last month and is well drawn for official debut; could have a say

runners.name: Sight Dreamer
runners.spotlight: Gained this season's two wins over 1m but looked as good as ever when close second over C&D three weeks ago; considered each-way.
runners.comment: Dual 1m winner this season; as good as ever when close second over C&D three weeks ago

runners.name: Star Of Hearts
runners.spotlight: First foal from a twice-raced maiden; has shown some promise in recent trials but is probably best watched on official debut.
runners.comment: Has shown some promise in recent trials but is probably best watched on official debut
runners.owner: Ting Ping Sing, Ting Wing Keung & Ting Mei Wan

runners.name: Absolute Lucky
runners.spotlight: Unplaced all five starts for Mark Newnham, showing only minor promise; improvement required on stable debut.
runners.comment: Unplaced all five starts for Mark Newnham, showing only minor promise; stable debut

runners.name: Forever Life
runners.spotlight: Reserve; has not shown a great deal in recent trials; will be making his official debut if he gets a run; tongue-tie/blinkers fitted.
runners.comment: Has not shown a great deal in recent trials; this will be his official debut

races.race_name: Peacock Handicap (Class 2) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Pocketing
runners.spotlight: Won 1m2f Group 2 in Australia last April; soft ground not ideal on his penultimate run and not disgraced either side of that, for all that he was behind some of these.
runners.comment: Early days in Hong Kong and not at all disgraced in two of his three starts

runners.name: Stunning Peach
runners.spotlight: Has made up the numbers in his last four races but those weren't easy tasks and he's now only 3lb higher than when beating Beauty Alliance over 1m1f here in March; couldn't rule out.
runners.comment: He's now only 3lb higher than when beating Beauty Alliance over 1m1f here in March

runners.name: Max Que
runners.spotlight: Improving 5yo having a fine season that has come at a cost mark-wise, and he's 6lb higher than for his C&D win in March; however, soft ground was a valid excuse on final run in early May and wouldn't read too much into subsequent trial defeat on AW.
runners.comment: Improving 5yo having a fine season that has come at a cost mark-wise
runners.owner: Ricky Ng Yu Chiu & To Ngo Fung

runners.name: Beauty Alliance
runners.spotlight: In career-best form in recent weeks, with even latest close sixth at Happy Valley no backward step; closely matched with a few of these but being well drawn for a prominent racer may give him an edge.
runners.comment: In career-best form and being well drawn for a prominent racer may give him an edge

runners.name: Mighty Masts
runners.spotlight: Consistent 4yo and probably still improving; best form has been at 7f but he emerged from off the pace to be a closing third 20 days ago and on that evidence a return to 1m is worth exploring; chance.
runners.comment: Consistent 4yo and probably still improving; this return to 1m is worth exploring
runners.owner: 24/25 Chris So Wai Yin Trainer Syndicate (2)

runners.name: Infinite Resolve
runners.spotlight: Won over 6f here in January and later second in the Classic Mile; had lost his way (behind three of these two runs ago) but got back on track when a staying-on fifth (close up behind Juneau Pride and Mighty Masts) over 7f here 20 days ago; this mark isn't beyond him.
runners.comment: Back on track when a staying-on fifth (close up) over 7f here 20 days ago

runners.name: Packing Angel
runners.spotlight: Back to something approaching his best form when winning easily at the expense of some of today's opposition over 1m at Happy Valley last month, since when he was a closing fourth there over 1m1f; after only 15 races he could yet have more to offer.
runners.comment: Close to career-best form at Happy Valley in recent weeks, finishing first and fourth

runners.name: Sagacious Life
runners.spotlight: 1m4f Group 1 winner in Brazil in late 2024; started off well in Hong Kong before heavy defeats in the Classic Cup and Hong Kong Derby, since when he's finished third in a trial; 7lb higher than for his last win in a handicap but has some class about him; new yard.
runners.comment: Started off well in Hong Kong before heavy defeats in the face of tough tasks

runners.name: Soleil Fighter
runners.spotlight: Exposed 6yo who likes to be up there; split Packing Angel and Beauty Alliance over Happy Valley's 1m two runs back but was behind both those there ten days ago; what will help is Nichola Yuen's claim as he's on a tough mark; considered.
runners.comment: Exposed 6yo but what will help is Nichola Yuen's claim as he's on a tough mark

races.race_name: Snipe Handicap (Class 3) (All Weather)

runners.name: Grand Eagle
runners.spotlight: 2-8 in Australia (all runs on turf); absent since third in 6f Listed race in October and probably best watched on Hong Kong debut.
runners.comment: Absent since Listed third in Australia in October; best watched on Hong Kong debut

runners.name: Pi Legend
runners.spotlight: Made all to open Hong Kong account over C&D when dipping into Class 4 in April but soundly beaten (albeit with some excuses) in this higher grade twice since; has a point to prove on stable debut.
runners.comment: Made all in Class 4 C&D contest in April but soundly beaten in this grade twice since

runners.name: Mr Energia
runners.spotlight: Won quite stylishly over C&D in October but has lost his way since; revival needed.
runners.comment: Won quite stylishly over C&D in October but has lost his way since; revival needed

runners.name: Must Go
runners.spotlight: Kept on well to exploit much-reduced mark in April, recording a sixth C&D success, but was safely held in C&D contest won by Blazing Wind last month and is evidently not as good as he was.
runners.comment: Exploited much-reduced mark over C&D in April but safely held since; others preferred

runners.name: Igor Stravinsky
runners.spotlight: Reserve; won narrowly over C&D in Class 4 in early April but has struggled on all three starts since returned to this higher grade.
runners.comment: Narrow C&D winner in April but has struggled in this higher grade since
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Cyrus Li Kin Wai

runners.name: Notthesillyone
runners.spotlight: Four wins this season, the latest over C&D last month; further progress is not out of the equation but he now needs to prove himself in this higher grade.
runners.comment: Four wins this season, the latest over C&D in May; needs to prove himself in this grade

runners.name: Vulcanus
runners.spotlight: Gained last month's win in Class 4 on turf but remains on a realistic mark after recent 6lb rise and this return to dirt will suit; wide draw an obvious negative, though.
runners.comment: Class 4 turf winner last month; goes well on dirt too but wide draw an obvious negative.

runners.name: Turquoise Velocity
runners.spotlight: Progressive 4yo with 4-7 strike-rate on turf; officially unraced on dirt but won a C&D trial in December; needs to be taken very seriously.
runners.comment: Progressive 4yo who has 4-7 strike-rate on turf and has won a C&D trial; shortlisted

runners.name: Titan Pegasus
runners.spotlight: Reserve; 2-3 as a 2yo in Australia, the latter win gained in 5.5f Group 3; well down the field on Hong Kong debut three weeks ago but suffered interference that day and can be given another chance.
runners.comment: 2yo Group 3 winner in Australia; suffered interference when down the field on HK debut

runners.name: Mighty Commander
runners.spotlight: Showed career-best form when winning over 7f on turf here in April and will be fine back at 6f but this 27th Hong Kong start will be his dirt debut, and his new mark demands even more from him.
runners.comment: Career-best form when winning over 7f on turf in April; this is a belated dirt debut

runners.name: Victory Sky
runners.spotlight: Three-time C&D winner this season; no match for clear winner Blazing Wind when second here last month but is 11lb better off with him today and has another good draw.
runners.comment: Three C&D wins this season; chased home Blazing Wind last time; well drawn again

runners.name: Blazing Wind
runners.spotlight: Took form to whole new level when comfortably drawing over 5l clear of Victory Sky over C&D last month and is now 3-9 on dirt; 11lb higher and drawn much wider today but still commands respect.
runners.comment: Took form to whole new level when winning comfortably by over 5l over C&D last month

runners.name: Aurora Patch
runners.spotlight: Three wins this season, the latest over C&D in February; placed over C&D on last three outings (twice from double-digit stalls) and evidently still in prime form but has another tough draw today.
runners.comment: Suited by this C&D and enjoying a good season but outside draw dents appeal

runners.name: Lucky Planet
runners.spotlight: Dual turf winner this season, more recently when just holding on to make all at Happy Valley in February; recent efforts suggest he's on a tough mark now, though, and he was well beaten on his only previous dirt start.
runners.comment: Well beaten on only previous dirt start and recent turf form suggests he's on a tough mark
runners.owner: Leung Kai Fai & Cheung Sui Ling

races.race_name: Spoonbill Handicap (Class 3) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Pope Cody
runners.spotlight: Struggled on soft ground two starts ago but quickly got back on track with third here (1m1f) last month; remains on a workable mark and will be fine over this shorter trip; each-way claims at least.
runners.comment: Quickly back on track with third here (1m1f) last month and remains on a workable mark

runners.name: Another World
runners.spotlight: Reserve; well handicapped if judged on best of this season's dirt form but has finished well down the field on his last four turf starts (7f-1m; cheekpieces refitted last time).
runners.comment: Well handicapped on this season's best dirt form but out of sorts on turf lately

runners.name: Withallmyfaith
runners.spotlight: 0-17 in Hong Kong but placed several times this season, losing out only by a neck on latest occasion at Happy Valley 17 days ago; quickly back up in grade here but can make his presence felt again.
runners.comment: 0-17 in HK but placed several times this season, losing out only by a neck last time

runners.name: Steps Ahead
runners.spotlight: Consistent over 7f/1m in early part of this season; not at same level since returning from break in March but travelled well for a long way here (7f) three weeks ago and has slipped to a tempting mark, even before Nichola Yuen's useful 10lb claim is considered.
runners.comment: Not at best since returning from a break in March but has slipped to a tempting mark
runners.owner: Yeung Sing Tung, Sunny Yeung Wah Hon & Janice Yeung Wah Kei

runners.name: So You Will
runners.spotlight: Runner-up off 3lb higher at Happy Valley in February but his last two runs there (both 1m1f) were underwhelming and he's now 0-7 in Hong Kong; sports new headgear collection today.
runners.comment: Second at Happy Valley in February but below that form lately; now 0-7 in Hong Kong

runners.name: Jumbo Steps
runners.spotlight: Bettered low-key Hong Kong debut (6f) when keeping-on fifth here (7f) last month but needs to take another step forward over this longer trip.
runners.comment: Kept on for fifth over 7f here last time; needs another step forward over this longer trip

runners.name: Big Return
runners.spotlight: In-form 4yo who recently completed a hat-trick of Class 4 C&D wins; combination of latest 7lb rise and today's rise in grade asks quite a lot of him, though.
runners.comment: Recently completed hat-trick of Class 4 C&D wins; has more on his plate at the level

runners.name: Quantum Legend
runners.spotlight: Showed only minor promise on first two Hong Kong starts (6f/7f) and has the outside draw for this first attempt at 1m but it could be significant that Zac Purton is booked again.
runners.comment: Showed only minor promise on first two Hong Kong starts (6f/7f) but Purton keeps the ride

runners.name: Complete Unknown
runners.spotlight: 0-4 in Hong Kong but lost out only narrowly over C&D when upped in trip and fitted with first-time cheekpieces over C&D a fortnight ago; could still have untapped potential over 1m; one to consider.
runners.comment: 0-4 in Hong Kong but lost out only narrowly over C&D when upped in trip two weeks ago

runners.name: Morgan Success
runners.spotlight: Ended last season with a C&D win but has finished well down the field on all five appearances this term; needs to turn a corner.
runners.comment: Well down the field on all five appearances this term; needs to turn a corner

runners.name: Dreaming Together
runners.spotlight: Ex-Australian 4yo; unable to land a telling blow on first four Hong Kong starts (7f-1m2f) and seemingly in need of more help from the local handicapper.
runners.comment: Unable to land a telling blow on first four Hong Kong starts (7f-1m2f)

runners.name: Trinity Treasure
runners.spotlight: Always behind on Hong Kong debut in March but ran big race from the front when fourth in first-time cheekpieces over C&D in April; no surprise if he makes another bold bid; tongue-tie added.
runners.comment: Always behind on HK debut but ran big race from the front when fourth over C&D last time
runners.owner: Zhao Guoming, Xiao Bing, Annie An Ran & Tan Meng Sha

runners.name: Goldfield
runners.spotlight: Unexposed 3yo who won a 7f maiden on the second of his two starts in Brazil; last of 13 over C&D on recent Hong Kong debut, though, and needs to have taken significant benefit from that outing.
runners.comment: Won won trained in Brazil but was last of 13 over C&D on recent Hong Kong debut
runners.owner: Yue Yun Hing & Anita Yue Lam Chik Sun

runners.name: Power Of Vitam
runners.spotlight: Caused 46-1 surprise over C&D in February, his second Hong Kong start, and probably bettered that performance when keeping-on second at Happy Valley (1m) last month; might be reliant upon others setting a strong pace but enters calculations.
runners.comment: Went close at Happy Valley last month; contender if he gets a good pace to aim at

runners.name: Endued
runners.spotlight: Dual C&D winner this year and placed over C&D on last three appearances; nudged up 2lb to another career-high mark after his close second a fortnight ago but ought to make his presence felt again.
runners.comment: Dual C&D winner this year and placed over C&D on last three appearances; respected

runners.name: Samarkand
runners.spotlight: Reserve; won at Happy Valley for David Hayes in November and made pleasing stable debut when second there in March; could have a say if ready to roll after 101-day break.
runners.comment: Second off today's mark on stable debut in March; returns from 101-day break

races.race_name: Owl Handicap (Class 3) (Course C+3 (Turf)

runners.name: Pass Line
runners.spotlight: 2-6 when based in Australia but absent since down-the-field finish in 1m2f Group 1 in October and might find 7f too sharp on Hong Kong debut.
runners.comment: 2-6 in Australia; off since October; may find 7f too sharp on this Hong Kong debut

runners.name: Conrad Patch
runners.spotlight: Pushed out for 6f Class 4 win here last month and now 2-7; moves up in grade today and failed to convince stamina-wise on previous attempt at 7f but still enters calculations.
runners.comment: Pushed out for 6f Class 4 win here last month and now 2-7; up in grade today

runners.name: Baby Sakura
runners.spotlight: Progressive 3yo with 2-5 strike-rate, the latter win gained over C&D in this grade last month; managed only fourth off today's mark three weeks later but may still have a bigger run in him.
runners.comment: Progressive 3yo with 2-5 strike-rate, the latter win gained over C&D in this grade
runners.owner: Chan Tak Wa & Ip Wai Yuen

runners.name: Pray For Justice
runners.spotlight: Reserve; not beaten far on any of first three Hong Kong starts (7f-1m) and a recent 2lb drop is helpful but others have stronger claims.
runners.comment: Not beaten far on any of his three Hong Kong starts but others look stronger

runners.name: Happy Boss
runners.spotlight: Dual C&D winner in Class 4 this season; not yet fully exposed after only six starts but was below form when upped to this grade last month and has the outside stall today.
runners.comment: Dual C&D winner in Class 4 this season; held in this grade last month; tough draw today

runners.name: Akashvani
runners.spotlight: Ran quite well before weakening into eighth over C&D last month but remains 5lb higher than when making all over here in January and others have more pressing claims.
runners.comment: Ran okay here last month but remains 5lb above last winning mark; others preferred

runners.name: Aerovolanic
runners.spotlight: Won consecutive C&D races in February/March and arguably posted another career-best performance when third from stall 14 here last month; much better drawn today and commands respect.
runners.comment: Dual C&D winner this year and a commendable third from stall 14 here last time
runners.owner: Gwenny Wu Pui Kwan & Daniel Yeung Ngai

runners.name: Perfectday
runners.spotlight: Kept on well for clearcut C&D win last month and is now 3-9; still unexposed over this trip and might still be on the upgrade; must be considered.
runners.comment: Kept on well for clearcut C&D win last month and is now 3-9; shortlisted
runners.owner: Choi Yui Hin & Daniel Choi Yui Fai

runners.name: Megastar Heart
runners.spotlight: Ex-Australian 4yo; unable to justify warm favouritism but shaped with much more promise than eventual 9l defeat might suggest on last month's Hong Kong debut (6f); no surprise if he gets closer to the target today.
runners.comment: Beaten favourite but shaped with some promise on HK debut; can do better

runners.name: Dragon Air Force
runners.spotlight: Won over 1m on dirt in January but recent efforts over that C&D suggest he's on a tough mark now; opposable on this rare turf start.
runners.comment: Dirt specialist; on a tough mark now; opposable on this rare turf start
runners.owner: Au Kai Kwong & Michelle Jessica Au

runners.name: The Red Hare
runners.spotlight: Didn't fire on penultimate outing but this largely consistent 4yo bounced back quickly with a clearcut C&D win last month; 7lb higher and drawn wider today but probably won't be far away.
runners.comment: Largely consistent 4yo; up 7lb for last month's C&D win but ought to run well again
runners.owner: Lo Yu Sai, Jasmine Lo Siu Yu Et Al

runners.name: Beauty Crescent
runners.spotlight: Won three times over C&D last year but has looked badly out of sorts since December; drawn wide; big leap of faith required to support him.
runners.comment: Badly out of sorts since December and drawn wide today

runners.name: Super Express
runners.spotlight: Consistent and steadily progressive 4yo who has run nine times over C&D, winning twice and finishing second on other seven occasions; didn't run badly from tough draw when dropped to 6f in April; likely to be right in the thick of things.
runners.comment: Has excellent record over C&D and didn't run badly from tough draw over 6f last time

runners.name: Riding Together
runners.spotlight: Reserve; dual C&D winner this season; emerged from dip in form with two fourths last month (7f/1m) but might still be a shade too high in the weights.
runners.comment: Dual C&D winner this season; might be a shade too high in the weights now

runners.name: Lovero
runners.spotlight: Gained all four Hong Kong wins over 1m; largely in good form for new stable since December but was below par on latest outing and this drop back in trip is not ideal.
runners.comment: Generally in good form over 1m this year but not at best last time and 7f is not ideal

runners.name: Yuen Long Elite
runners.spotlight: Won twice (once over C&D) last season but was out of form when last seen in November and has a fair bit more to prove than some of these.
runners.comment: Out of form when last seen in November; others have much less to prove
runners.owner: Friend Of Yuen Long Merchants Assn Syndicate
